title: amphiglossa celans
intro: Amphiglossa celans, also known as the Cape daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Amphiglossa celans include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers to harness its therapeutic properties.
